description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was traveling eastbound on Lombard St. towards Leavenworth St. following a sharp curve in the road when 
it made contact with a concrete abutment on the right. There were no injuries and police were not called. Autonomy was not engaged at any 
point during the drive cycle proceeding the event. 
Print
Clear Form
